scoringPlays.text: Dante Moore 1 Yd Run (Atticus Sappington Kick)
Denzel Boston 3 Yd pass from Demond Williams Jr. (Grady Gross Kick)
Denzel Boston 13 Yd pass from Demond Williams Jr. (Grady Gross Kick)
Malik Benson 64 Yd pass from Dante Moore (Atticus Sappington Kick)

videos.headline: Dante Moore scores Oregon's first TD
videos.description: Dante Moore rushes for a 1-yard Ducks touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dante Moore scores Oregon's first TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Denzel Boston puts Washington on the board
videos.description: Demond Williams Jr. fires to Denzel Boston for a 3-yard Huskies TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Denzel Boston puts Washington on the board) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Washington's Denzel Boston scores big TD on fourth down
videos.description: Denzel Boston's 13-yard touchdown makes it a one-score game against Oregon.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington’s Denzel Boston scores big TD on 4th down) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oregon’s Malik Benson takes it to the house
videos.description: Dante Moore finds Malik Benson for a 64-yard Ducks touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oregon’s Malik Benson takes it to the house) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
